form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 324m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.77) behind Brailey Banner in a Grade 4 on April 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 324m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.77) behind Brailey Banner in a Grade 4 on April 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn hampered, crowded for room and came together.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 388m at Gosford in a handy (22.95), beating Major Johnson. Makes plenty of appeal on that latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 388m at Gosford in a handy (22.95), beating Major Johnson. Makes plenty of appeal on that latest effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 324m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.66) behind Storms Will Roll in a NG on April 2. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 3, scoring three times. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th over 324m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.66) behind Storms Will Roll in a NG on April 2. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 3, scoring three times. Go close.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 340m at Bulli. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 340m at Bulli. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered by contact in the first turn.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Doonside Lewis at this track last start over 324m (17.95). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Doonside Lewis at this track last start over 324m (17.95). Has to be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together at 250m; Shortly after came together with another at 200m.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (17.96) over 324m at this track. Looking to others.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (17.96) over 324m at this track. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 324m. Among the chances on his best efforts.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 324m (17.67) beating Mighty Lad in Mix 2/3 on April 2. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 8, scoring three times. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 324m (17.67) beating Mighty Lad in Mix 2/3 on April 2. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 8, scoring three times. Go close.
